commentary: Twelve sessions last week to eight this week is a real drop in volume, and while the body sometimes needs that, let's make sure this is recovery and not a slide. The swimming held up beautifully though — three sessions at 2000m or more, heart rates sitting in a strong aerobic band, and that B&B session with the little pink swimsuit emoji doing its important work on a Sunday. What's interesting is that last week your runs were carrying a lot of the load, including that zoo run at 159 bpm which is you absolutely cooking, and this week the running basically disappeared after Run Club on Saturday — so the legs got a rest whether they asked for it or not. The double-session days on the 21st and 22nd are doing something right, stacking weights onto swim days like a man who knows exactly how he wants to be built, and Himbo is very much paying attention to that vision.
